description: Geography capability progression map — Skills strand, Year 7 to 10. Four sub-strands following ACARA headings.
subject: Geography

standards.title: Develop inquiry questions
standards.description: develop questions for a geographical inquiry related to a phenomenon or challenge
standards.capability_goal: Students develop questions for a geographical inquiry related to a phenomenon or challenge.

standards.title: Collect and represent data
standards.description: collect, organise and represent data and information from primary research methods, including fieldwork and secondary research materials, using geospatial technologies and digital tools as appropriate
standards.capability_goal: Students collect, organise and represent data from primary and secondary research methods using geospatial technologies.

standards.title: Interpret geographical data
standards.description: interpret and analyse geographical data and information to identify similarities and differences, explain patterns and trends and infer relationships
standards.capability_goal: Students interpret and analyse geographical data to identify similarities and differences, explain patterns and trends and infer relationships.

standards.title: Draw conclusions
standards.description: draw conclusions based on the analysis of the data and information
standards.capability_goal: Students draw conclusions based on analysis of data and information.

standards.title: Identify strategies for action
standards.description: identify a strategy for action in relation to environmental, economic, social or other factors, and explain potential impacts
standards.capability_goal: Students identify a strategy for action and explain potential impacts.

standards.title: Create geographical responses
standards.description: create descriptions, explanations and responses, using geographical knowledge and methods, concepts, terms and reference sources
standards.capability_goal: Students create descriptions, explanations and responses using geographical knowledge, methods, concepts and terms.

standards.title: Develop inquiry questions
standards.description: develop questions for a geographical inquiry related to a phenomenon or challenge
standards.capability_goal: Students develop questions for a geographical inquiry related to a phenomenon or challenge.

standards.title: Collect and represent data
standards.description: collect, organise and represent data and information from primary research methods, including fieldwork and secondary research materials, using geospatial technologies and digital tools as appropriate
standards.capability_goal: Students collect, organise and represent data from primary and secondary research methods using geospatial technologies.

standards.title: Interpret geographical data
standards.description: interpret and analyse geographical data and information to identify similarities and differences, explain patterns and trends and infer relationships
standards.capability_goal: Students interpret and analyse geographical data to identify similarities and differences, explain patterns and trends and infer relationships.

standards.title: Draw conclusions
standards.description: draw conclusions based on the analysis of the data and information
standards.capability_goal: Students draw conclusions based on analysis of data and information.

standards.title: Identify strategies for action
standards.description: identify a strategy for action in relation to environmental, economic, social or other factors, and explain potential impacts
standards.capability_goal: Students identify a strategy for action and explain potential impacts.

standards.title: Create geographical responses
standards.description: create descriptions, explanations and responses, using geographical knowledge and methods, concepts, terms and reference sources
standards.capability_goal: Students create descriptions, explanations and responses using geographical knowledge, methods, concepts and terms.

standards.title: Develop range of inquiry questions
standards.description: develop a range of questions for a geographical inquiry related to a phenomenon or challenge
standards.capability_goal: Students develop a range of questions for a geographical inquiry related to a phenomenon or challenge.

standards.title: Collect, represent and compare data
standards.description: collect, represent and compare data and information from primary research methods, including fieldwork and secondary research materials, using geospatial technologies and digital tools as appropriate
standards.capability_goal: Students collect, represent and compare data from primary and secondary research methods using geospatial technologies.

standards.title: Evaluate and generalise from data
standards.description: evaluate geographical data and information to make generalisations and predictions, explain patterns and trends and infer relationships
standards.capability_goal: Students evaluate geographical data to make generalisations and predictions, explain patterns and trends and infer relationships.

standards.title: Justify conclusions
standards.description: evaluate data and information to justify conclusions
standards.capability_goal: Students evaluate data and information to justify conclusions.

standards.title: Evaluate and recommend strategies
standards.description: develop and evaluate strategies using environmental, economic or social criteria; recommend a strategy and explain the predicted impacts
standards.capability_goal: Students develop and evaluate strategies using environmental, economic or social criteria and recommend a course of action.

standards.title: Create referenced geographical responses
standards.description: create descriptions, explanations and responses, using geographical knowledge and geographical tools as appropriate, and concepts and terms that incorporate and acknowledge research findings
standards.capability_goal: Students create descriptions, explanations and responses using geographical knowledge and tools that incorporate and acknowledge research findings.

standards.title: Develop range of inquiry questions
standards.description: develop a range of questions for a geographical inquiry related to a phenomenon or challenge
standards.capability_goal: Students develop a range of questions for a geographical inquiry related to a phenomenon or challenge.

standards.title: Collect, represent and compare data
standards.description: collect, represent and compare data and information from primary research methods, including fieldwork and secondary research materials, using geospatial technologies and digital tools as appropriate
standards.capability_goal: Students collect, represent and compare data from primary and secondary research methods using geospatial technologies.

standards.title: Evaluate and generalise from data
standards.description: evaluate geographical data and information to make generalisations and predictions, explain patterns and trends and infer relationships
standards.capability_goal: Students evaluate geographical data to make generalisations and predictions, explain patterns and trends and infer relationships.

standards.title: Justify conclusions
standards.description: evaluate data and information to justify conclusions
standards.capability_goal: Students evaluate data and information to justify conclusions.

standards.title: Evaluate and recommend strategies
standards.description: develop and evaluate strategies using environmental, economic or social criteria; recommend a strategy and explain the predicted impacts
standards.capability_goal: Students develop and evaluate strategies and recommend a course of action with predicted impacts.

standards.title: Create referenced geographical responses
standards.description: create descriptions, explanations and responses, using geographical knowledge and geographical tools as appropriate, and concepts and terms that incorporate and acknowledge research findings
standards.capability_goal: Students create descriptions, explanations and responses using geographical knowledge and tools that incorporate and acknowledge research findings.

capability_threads.description: Geography skills capability sequences Y7-10 following ACARA sub-strand headings.

questioning.label: Questioning and researching using geographical methods

interpreting.label: Interpreting and analysing geographical data and information
